title: Tab Navigation
description: Build tab navigation with useReducer. Switch between Tab1, Tab2, and Tab3 content panels.
checklist: Each button dispatches SELECT_TAB with tab name

hints.guide: // guide hints: Import: import React, { useReducer } from react
// guide hints: Define SELECT_TAB action type and initial state
// guide hints: Reducer updates selectedTab from action.payload
// guide hints: useReducer with reducer and initialState
// guide hints: Tab buttons dispatch SELECT_TAB with tab name
hints.code:
<button onClick={() => dispatch({ type: SELECT_TAB, payload: 'Tab1' })}>Tab1</button>
<button onClick={() => dispatch({ type: SELECT_TAB, payload: 'Tab2' })}>Tab2</button>
<button onClick={() => dispatch({ type: SELECT_TAB, payload: 'Tab3' })}>Tab3</button>

hints.guide: // guide hints: Conditionally render content for selected tab
// guide hints: Export: export default TabNavigation;
